## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential collaboration between GrowthX and freelance writer Genevieve Michaels for a new AI-focused publication.](https://fathom.video/share/R-y8a9CNLYd735irFVre2zSsn3iqtABU?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX aims to launch a new publication sharing raw, valuable insights on AI in growth/marketing](https://fathom.video/share/R-y8a9CNLYd735irFVre2zSsn3iqtABU?tab=summary&timestamp=8.0)
  - [Genevieve's experience in technical, interview-based writing aligns well with GrowthX's needs](https://fathom.video/share/R-y8a9CNLYd735irFVre2zSsn3iqtABU?tab=summary&timestamp=113.0)
  - [Both parties are interested in exploring AI tools to enhance writing workflow and efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/R-y8a9CNLYd735irFVre2zSsn3iqtABU?tab=summary&timestamp=117.0)
  - [Next steps involve GrowthX sharing more details on desired content and Genevieve providing rate estimates](https://fathom.video/share/R-y8a9CNLYd735irFVre2zSsn3iqtABU?tab=summary&timestamp=1223.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Overview and New Publication Concept

  - [GrowthX: Growth agency outsourcing content marketing/SEO for clients like Webflow, Ramp](https://fathom.video/share/R-y8a9CNLYd735irFVre2zSsn3iqtABU?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Launching new publication (potentially named "The Output") focused on raw, valuable insights on AI in growth](https://fathom.video/share/R-y8a9CNLYd735irFVre2zSsn3iqtABU?tab=summary&timestamp=562.0)
  - [Aim: Distance from GrowthX brand, feature external voices, avoid repackaging existing info](https://fathom.video/share/R-y8a9CNLYd735irFVre2zSsn3iqtABU?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Content types: Teardowns, first-party research, personal experiences in AI/growth](https://fathom.video/share/R-y8a9CNLYd735irFVre2zSsn3iqtABU?tab=summary&timestamp=715.0)

### Genevieve's Writing Background and Approach

  - [Specializes in interview/data-based writing, technical and product-focused content](https://fathom.video/share/R-y8a9CNLYd735irFVre2zSsn3iqtABU?tab=summary&timestamp=1199.0)
  - [Prefers long-term collaborations to deeply understand companies/products](https://fathom.video/share/R-y8a9CNLYd735irFVre2zSsn3iqtABU?tab=summary&timestamp=1199.0)
  - [Experience: Technical long-form case studies, ebooks, white papers, exec ghostwriting](https://fathom.video/share/R-y8a9CNLYd735irFVre2zSsn3iqtABU?tab=summary&timestamp=1199.0)
  - [Comfortable with technical subjects, making them compelling for readers](https://fathom.video/share/R-y8a9CNLYd735irFVre2zSsn3iqtABU?tab=summary&timestamp=1199.0)

### AI in Writing Process

  - [Genevieve uses AI for transcription, summaries, brainstorming titles/headers](https://fathom.video/share/R-y8a9CNLYd735irFVre2zSsn3iqtABU?tab=summary&timestamp=1600.0)
  - [Both interested in exploring AI tools to enhance writing efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/R-y8a9CNLYd735irFVre2zSsn3iqtABU?tab=summary&timestamp=1545.0)
  - [GrowthX's current AI workflow: Research, outline creation, writing, post-processing](https://fathom.video/share/R-y8a9CNLYd735irFVre2zSsn3iqtABU?tab=summary&timestamp=175.0)

### Content Strategy and Branding

  - [Discussion on creating distinct brand voice and positioning for target audiences](https://fathom.video/share/R-y8a9CNLYd735irFVre2zSsn3iqtABU?tab=summary&timestamp=2071.0)
  - [Example: Webflow's potential separate publication for developers](https://fathom.video/share/R-y8a9CNLYd735irFVre2zSsn3iqtABU?tab=summary&timestamp=2100.0)
  - [Importance of consistent theme/voice in content to feel less commoditized](https://fathom.video/share/R-y8a9CNLYd735irFVre2zSsn3iqtABU?tab=summary&timestamp=2071.0)

### LinkedIn Content and Distribution

  - [Genevieve gets work primarily through LinkedIn](https://fathom.video/share/R-y8a9CNLYd735irFVre2zSsn3iqtABU?tab=summary&timestamp=1653.0)
  - [GrowthX exploring helping clients post more on LinkedIn](https://fathom.video/share/R-y8a9CNLYd735irFVre2zSsn3iqtABU?tab=summary&timestamp=2196.0)
  - [Discussion on effective LinkedIn content strategies](https://fathom.video/share/R-y8a9CNLYd735irFVre2zSsn3iqtABU?tab=summary&timestamp=2177.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to send over more details on desired content/articles](https://fathom.video/share/R-y8a9CNLYd735irFVre2zSsn3iqtABU?tab=summary&timestamp=1496.0)
  - [Genevieve to provide rate estimates based on project scope](https://fathom.video/share/R-y8a9CNLYd735irFVre2zSsn3iqtABU?tab=summary&timestamp=2208.0)
  - [GrowthX to send Slack invite for communication](https://fathom.video/share/R-y8a9CNLYd735irFVre2zSsn3iqtABU?tab=summary&timestamp=2288.0)
  - [Genevieve to share product operations ebook sample](https://fathom.video/share/R-y8a9CNLYd735irFVre2zSsn3iqtABU?tab=summary&timestamp=2280.0)
  - [Genevieve to check NDA terms for sharing ghostwriting samples](https://fathom.video/share/R-y8a9CNLYd735irFVre2zSsn3iqtABU?tab=summary&timestamp=2280.0)
